'''Gujdim Wiphshun''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] who served as [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Gran Protectorate/Legends|Gran Protectorate]] on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]].

==Biography==
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Gujdim Wiphshun hosted peace-talks between the [[Lannik High Court]] and the [[Red Iaro/Legends|Red Iaro]] [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorists]]. The peace talks were held in the presence of the Gran Protectorate. Later, a group of Jedi who were also present during the interviews and acted as arbitrators.

{{Char-stub}}
